MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD
Off Calendar Oct-08-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS UBS FINANCIAL SERVICES, INC., WENDI ECKHARDT, DON TRABERT, AND JOE ASIANO'S MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD is granted. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGMENT SIGNED. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/HEK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-14-2012 Continued To May-29-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Action
Off Calendar Sep-11-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: peter j. marshall, esq., palmer, lombardi & donohue, 415.489.4801, for defendants ubs financial services, inc., wendi eckhardt, don trabert and joe asiano; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS UBS FINANCIAL SERVICES, INC., WENDI ECKHARDT, DON TRABERT and JOE ASIANO'S Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Action is Granted. Plaintiff's claims against UBS arise out of his business activities with UBS and thus those claims are within the scope of the Arbitration Agreement contained in the Form U4 and FINRA Code of Arbitration Procedure Rule 13200. Plaintiff's claims against the individual Defendants are also arbitrable because the individual Defendants are alleged to be employees of Defendant UBS and to have acted within the course and scope of their employment when making the allegedly defamatory statements. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
